channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: Kindness-Kismet/Stelliberty
item.description: A modern proxy client built with Flutter and Rust, powered by Clash Mihomo core

item.title: mixedbread-ai/mgrep
item.description: A calm, CLI-native way to semantically grep everything, like code, images, pdfs and more.

item.title: muset-ai/awesome-nano-banana-pro
item.description: Awesome curated collection of images and prompts built with the soon-to-launch Nano Banana Pro model. Browse limited early-access test cases that highlight Nano Banana Pro’s strengths in consistent, high-quality AI visual generation and editing.

item.title: unhappychoice/gitlogue
item.description: A cinematic Git commit replay tool for the terminal, turning your Git history into a living, animated story.

item.title: Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5
item.description: HunyuanVideo-1.5: A leading lightweight video generation model

item.title: hexagonal-sun/moss
item.description: Rust Linux-compatible kernel

item.title: PallavAg/iOS-Clone-SwiftUI
item.description: iOS Clone built by Gemini 3.0 Pro in SwiftUI

item.title: systemdesign42/system-design-academy
item.description: Newsletter to help busy software engineers become good at system design 👇

item.title: PegorK/f32
item.description: (no description)

item.title: tile-ai/TileRT
item.description: Tile-Based Runtime for Ultra-Low-Latency LLM Inference

item.title: facebookresearch/sam-3d-body
item.description: The repository provides code for running inference with the SAM 3D Body Model (3DB), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints and datasets, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

item.title: facebookresearch/MHR
item.description: Momentum Human Rig is an anatomically-inspired parametric full-body digital human model developed at Meta. It includes: A parametric body skeletal model; A realistic 3D mesh skinned to the skeleton with levels of detail;A body blendshape and pose corrective model; A facial blendshape model.Its design is friendly for both CG and CV communities.

item.title: dzhng/claude-agent-server
item.description: Run Claude Agent (Claude Code) in a sandbox, control it via websocket

item.title: supertone-inc/supertonic
item.description: Lightning-fast, on-device TTS — running natively via ONNX.

item.title: facebookresearch/sam3
item.description: The repository provides code for running inference and finetuning with the Meta Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM 3), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

item.title: facebookresearch/sam-3d-objects
item.description: SAM 3D Objects

item.title: Hans-Halverson/brimstone
item.description: New JavaScript engine written in Rust

item.title: GibsonAI/Memori
item.description: Open-Source Memory Engine for LLMs, AI Agents & Multi-Agent Systems

item.title: Mic92/strace-macos
item.description: A clone of the strace command for macOS

item.title: karpathy/reader3
item.description: Quick illustration of how one can easily read books together with LLMs. It's great and I highly recommend it.

item.title: kaushiksrini/parqeye
item.description: Peek inside Parquet files right from your terminal

item.title: LTH14/JiT
item.description: PyTorch implementation of JiT https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.13720

item.title: buyukakyuz/install-nothing
item.description: A terminal application that simulates installing things but doesn't actually install anything

item.title: K-Dense-AI/karpathy
item.description: An agentic Machine Learning Engineer

item.title: AnandChowdhary/continuous-claude
item.description: 🔂 Run Claude Code in a continuous loop, autonomously creating PRs, waiting for checks, and merging

item.title: kavishdevar/librepods
item.description: AirPods liberated from Apple's ecosystem.

item.title: xxnuo/open-coreui
item.description: Open CoreUI - A rewritten Open WebUI in Rust, significantly reducing memory and resource usage, requiring no dependency services, no Docker, with both a server version and a Tauri-based desktop client. (formerly Open WebUI Lite)

item.title: djyde/ccmate
item.description: Configure your Claude Code without pain

item.title: medusalix/FreeMDU
item.description: Open hardware and software tools for communicating with Miele appliances via their optical diagnostic interface

item.title: steipete/oracle
item.description: Ask the oracle when you're stuck. Invoke GPT-5 Pro with a custom context and files.

item.title: p-e-w/heretic
item.description: Fully automatic censorship removal for language models

item.title: straight-tamago/misaka26
item.description: iOS /iPadOS 16.0 - 26.1, An ultimate customization tool, uilitizing the bug that makes TrollRestore possible.

item.title: zigbook/zigbook
item.description: A comprehensive guide to the Zig programming language, a journey from fundamentals to advanced systems programming.

item.title: coderabbitai/git-worktree-runner
item.description: Bash-based Git worktree manager with editor and AI tool integration. Automates per-branch worktree creation, configuration copying, dependency installation, and workspace setup for efficient parallel development.

item.title: nicotsx/ironmount
item.description: Backup automation for self-hosters

item.title: google/adk-go
item.description: An open-source, code-first Go toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with flexibility and control.

item.title: hanakim3945/bl_sbx
item.description: itunesstored & bookassetd sbx escape

item.title: SouzaFrontend/tisa
item.description: tisa is an emulator for the Tiny ISA

item.title: raduacg/game-mechanics-optimizations
item.description: A list of 171 game mechanics techniques, performance optimizations and player experience tips to use as inspiration for your next games!

item.title: tonl-dev/tonl
item.description: TONL (Token-Optimized Notation Language)

item.title: hopx-ai/hopx
item.description: The Cloud for AI Agents — secure, real-world environments that spin up in milliseconds.

item.title: eooce/Cloudflare-proxy
item.description: Running VLESS + trojan + shadowsocks on cloudflare workers and snippets

item.title: universal-tool-calling-protocol/code-mode
item.description: 🔌 Plug-and-play library to enable agents to call MCP and UTCP tools via code execution.

item.title: Prayag2/drawy
item.description: Your handy, infinite, brainstorming tool

item.title: runxiyu/furgit
item.description: Fast Git library in pure Go

item.title: gamosoft/NoteDiscovery
item.description: Your Self-Hosted Knowledge Base
